rawDependencyOutputs.fetch-open-prs:
I don't have Azure DevOps MCP tools available, and this repository is on GitHub (not Azure DevOps). The Azure CLI requires an Azure DevOps organization URL to be configured, but no default is set.

To query Azure DevOps pull requests, I need either:
1. **Azure DevOps MCP tools** - not available in this environment
2. **Azure DevOps organization URL** - please provide the organization URL (e.g., `https://dev.azure.com/YourOrganization/`) and project name

Please provide the Azure DevOps organization URL and project name, and I'll retrieve the PR data.
